title: sorbus cretica subsp. baldaccii
intro: Sorbus cretica subsp. baldaccii, also known as the Baldacci Whitebeam, is a subspecies of shrub or small tree native to Italy. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Italian medicine, where it has been used to treat various health issues. The medicinal properties of Sorbus cretica subsp. baldaccii include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and protecting against free radicals. Herbal preparations of Sorbus cretica subsp. baldaccii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made from its leaves, bark, and flowers.
